_comment: Scheme-wide standardized query / rejection / audit-flag catalog (NOT per procedure). Built from the Claims Adjudication Manual. Per-procedure query risks live in each STG's common_queries[]; this file is the master list those reference. Powers QueryPredictor scoring and DeviationDetector.

preauth_rejection_reasons.label: Government-reserved package booked by private hospital
Hospital not empanelled for this specialty
Mismatch of package and disease / diagnosis / treatment / gender / age
Query replies not received within TAT
Need for hospitalization not justified by clinical findings

claim_rejection_reasons.label: Cash bill generated / amount paid by patient
Documentation: incomplete submission after multiple queries
OPD converted into IPD (admission not justified)
Package selection: hospital not empanelled for specialty
Package selection: mismatch of package and disease / diagnosis / treatment / gender / age

audit_red_flags.label: Claim paid for more days than actual hospitalization
Same patient photo reused across multiple claims (esp. dialysis)
Stable patient kept in ICU to inflate rate
All indoor case papers in the same handwriting
Investigation reports not signed / stamped by doctor
Claimed amount over the package cap
Major discrepancies in indoor case papers
Duplicate documents / documents belonging to another patient
Surgical treatment booked under 'Unspecified' instead of the correct package code
